title: Simple Structures: Ad Astra
description: This modification adds simple structures to the Ad Astra mod.
body:
This modification adds 101 structures to the world for the **Ad Astra** mod. The work requires[Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

 ![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca5b7f0a618f1b0d560394ad995a7648fea96a48.png)

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a498bf7ab8cbf615a3b1cc0faf8b5c6db3e3af.jpeg)

_______________________________________________________________________________________

### Supports planets:

Ad Astra (47 structures)

Star Wars Planets (27 structures)

Dandi2k8's Ad Extendra (27 structures)

_______________________________________________________________________________________
### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)

_______________________________________________________________________________________
### All projects for modification **Ad Astra**:

[Simple Structure: Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-structure-ad-astra)

[Dungeon And Village: Ad Astra ](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeon-and-village-ad-astra)

[Ad Astra: Recycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra-recycling)

[Ad Astra: Ashes of Luyten](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra-ashes-of-luyten)


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### **AI** - only the project icon was generated
